behavior_in_task_description.reason: All test usernames (civitmod, c1vitai, etc.) and file paths (src/utils/blocklist-username.json) are explicitly listed in instruction.md.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes the problem and verification cases but doesn't state the exact strings to add to the blocklist.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests only check behavior via the blocklist dict; any set of partial entries that correctly blocks/allows the listed usernames would pass.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests load JSON and execute is_username_permitted logic, plus run vitest subprocesses.

test_not_tautological.reason: F2p tests assert specific usernames are rejected; a stub cannot satisfy both rejection of civit variants and allowing civic/civil.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover all rejected and allowed usernames from instruction's verification section.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are organized into TestUsernameBlocklist, TestBlocklistJsonStructure, and TestRepoCI classes with clear docstrings.

structured_data_schema.reason: Instruction documents the JSON schema with 'partial' and 'exact' array keys.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names the file to edit but localization is the task itself; doesn't reveal exact blocklist entries.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Gold patch appends 4 entries to the partial array without rewriting the whole file.
